steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to smell a flower?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face.

questions.question_text: Which part of your face do you smile with?
What do you use to see the stars in the night sky?
questions.hint: They open and close like windows.

steps.title: My Happy Face
steps.text: This is my face. I have two big eyes. I have a small nose. My mouth is smiling. I am happy!

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Tim. This is my face. I have a small nose and two blue eyes.

questions.question: How many eyes does Tim have?

questions.question_text: I have one ___ on my face. (Grammar question)
Which part of your face do you use to see? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: You have two eyes.
Fill in the blank: This is my _____.
How many mouths do you have?

lessons.title: Listen and Look
lessons.topic: Auditory and decorative parts of the head

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What part helps us hear music?
questions.hint: They are on the sides of your head.

questions.question_text: What do we use to eat yummy snacks?
Which part lets us see the world?

steps.title: My Funny Face
steps.text: Look! This is my funny face. I have small ears and big blue hair. My head is round. Can you hear me with your ears?

steps.explanation: Say what color a part is.

steps.audio_text: Look at my head! I have brown hair and two big eyes. My ears are small.

questions.question: How many eyes does the person have?

questions.question_text: My ___ is brown. (Vocabulary question)
My eyes are ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: We listen with our ears.
What do we use to see? (Reading comprehension question)

lessons.title: My Whole Head
lessons.topic: Reviewing the head as a whole

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to see stars at night?
What helps you smell flowers?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face.

questions.question_text: Which part helps you wiggle eyebrows?

steps.title: Big Smile, Small Nose
steps.text: I have a big smile. This is my nose. It is small. The elephant has big ears. They are very large!

questions.question: Is my nose big or small?

steps.explanation: Use big or small to talk about size.

steps.audio_text: Hi there! Meet my brother. He has big, bright eyes and a tiny nose. His hair is brown.

questions.question_text: I have a ___ smile.
Which word means 'a happy expression'?
True or False: 'I have small ears.' uses an adjective.
What do you use to say 'I have a big head'?
Fill in the blank: He has a ____ nose.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to smell flowers?
Which part helps you to see in the dark?
questions.hint: You use these to read books!

questions.question_text: What do you use to clap when you're happy?
questions.hint: You use them to hold things!

steps.title: Funny Face
steps.text: This is my funny face! I have two big blue eyes. I have one small orange nose. My mouth is big and smiles a lot. Do you like my face?

questions.question: How many noses does it have?

steps.audio_text: This is my cute puppy. He has two small ears and a big smile. His tail wags when he's happy.

questions.question: How many ears does the puppy have?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a big head and two small ears.
steps.expected_text: i have a big head and two small ears

questions.question_text: This is my ___ cat. (Grammar question)
Which word means 'two of something'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'I have two ears' uses plural grammar.
If you have two big eyes, it means your eyes are...
Complete the sentence: '___ is my friend.'
